# Frequency Analysis

**Summary**: Analysis of the natural frequencies of the drill string to identify and avoid resonance zones.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022]] performed frequency analysis to determine critical RPMs and ensure the BHA was not excited by any natural frequency.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The free vibration analysis showed that the BHA is free of vibration between 60-80 rpm, which aligns with the recommended parameters. ([[2022-al-dahmoush|Al-Dahmoush, 2022, p. 79]])
